title: 40mm Steel Combination Padlock - 3 Number
features: 40MM TRI-CIRCLE HEAVY DUTY COMBINATION CHROME PADLOCK WITH 6MM SHACKLE
description: 40MM TRI-CIRCLE HEAVY DUTY COMBINATION CHROME PADLOCK WITH 6MM SHACKLE THE PADLOCK IS SUPPLIED PRESET WITH THE FACTORY SETTING OF "0 0 0" BUT HAS A RE SETTABLE COMBINATION SO YOU CAN SET YOUR OWN MEMORABLE COMBINATION SUCH AS YOUR BIRTHDAY, HOUSE NUMBER, PHONE NUMBER, ETC......... Description - Tri-Circle heavy duty padlock Chrome so won't rust if used outside Three dial changeable combination Combination can be changed to your choice as many times as you like for security reasons Size: 65mm x 40mm Shackle size: 6mm No keys to lose or keep safe Ideal for sports room lockers, luggage, toolboxes, cycles, gates, etc......
